class.name: mowgli_nav2_plugins/PathProgressGoalChecker
class.description: Coverage-aware goal checker. Fires only after the controller has monotonically tracked at least `progress_threshold` (default 95 percent) of the FTC-republished plan's poses AND is within xy/yaw tolerance of the goal pose. Prevents the SimpleGoalChecker false-positive where a coverage path's final pose happens to lie near the perimeter, completing the action during headland mowing with under 2 percent coverage.
